title: lotus conjugatus var. requienii
intro: Lotus conjugatus var. requienii, also known as the Lotus or Requien's Lotus, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Lotus conjugatus var. requienii include reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Lotus conjugatus var. requienii is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
